headline: Gold's Worst Quarterly Selloff in 13 Years: 3 Miners for the Long Haul
summary: Gold's sharpest quarterly selloff in 13 years may offer a long-haul entry point into DRDGOLD, Newmont and Barrick Mining.

headline: What to Expect From Newmont's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Newmont will release its second-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a double-digit bottom-line growth.

headline: Why Are Central Banks Buying So Much Gold? 90% Institutions Cite This Reason
summary: Central banks are turning to gold for protection against crises, inflation and geopolitical risks, according to the World Gold Council survey.
